summary: Iteration 36 - Body Content Font Controls and Editable Info Cards Testing COMPLETE. All 6 font controls verified in Body Content section: Section Title, Description Text, 'What Clients Say' Heading, Testimonial Text, Info Card Heading, Info Card Bullet Text. Editable Card 1/Card 2 titles and bullet points work correctly. Admin changes to card titles reflect on session detail page. All features implemented as requested.
critical_code_review_comments: PageHeadersTab.jsx: Body Content section correctly implements 6 font controls using StyleCell component
PageHeadersTab.jsx: Card 1/Card 2 title inputs with textarea for bullet points (one per line) implemented
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Correctly reads testimonial_heading_style, info_card_heading_style, info_card_text_style from session_template
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Info cards use dynamic card1_title, card1_items, card2_title, card2_items from admin settings with proper fallbacks
applyStyle helper function correctly applies font styling to elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Body Content section in Page Headers tab under 'PERSONAL SESSIONS — STYLE CONTROL' now has 6 font controls: Section Title, Description Text, 'What Clients Say' Heading, Testimonial Text, Info Card Heading, Info Card Bullet Text. Also has editable Card 1 Title, Card 1 Bullet Points, Card 2 Title, Card 2 Bullet Points. Config stored at settings.page_heroes.session_template with keys: title_style, description_style, testimonial_heading_style, testimonial_style, info_card_heading_style, info_card_text_style, card1_title, card1_items, card2_title, card2_items.

body_content_6_font_controls.each_control_has: Color picker, Font family dropdown, Font size dropdown, Bold button, Italic button

admin_card_title_change_reflects_on_page.test_performed: Changed Card 1 Title to 'TEST: What to Expect Here', saved, verified on session detail page, then restored to original
